offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inconsistent equipment maintenance causes tenant dissatisfaction. We provide a preventative maintenance tracker instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules and work orders.
problem: Inconsistent equipment maintenance leading to tenant dissatisfaction
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual scheduling for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
